name: Hugging Face
description: The GitHub of ML — a platform for sharing models, datasets, and Spaces. The Transformers library provides access to thousands of pre-trained models.
whyUseIt: Hugging Face is where the AI community shares and collaborates. Access 400K+ pre-trained models, 100K+ datasets, and deploy models with Inference API. The Transformers library is essential for NLP and increasingly for vision and audio.
